_comment: Copy this file to setup/config.json and fill it in. setup/config.json is gitignored.
_historyNote: Each turn = one user message + one reply. Higher = more context but more cost and privacy exposure.

contactMethods._whatsappNote: Phone number with country code, digits only. e.g. 447000000000
contactMethods._calendarNote: Full URL to your booking page. e.g. https://cal.com/yourname/intro

_allowedTopicsNote: Keywords the bot is allowed to discuss. Empty = allow anything in the profile. e.g. ['services', 'experience', 'contact']

security._originsNote: Only these origins can use your bot. Include every domain variant (www and non-www).

llm._providerNote: openai uses the OpenAI Chat Completions API. anthropic uses Anthropic Claude. Both use the same LLM_API_KEY secret.
llm._modelNote: null uses the provider default. openai default: gpt-4o-mini. anthropic default: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001. Other openai options: gpt-4o, gpt-4-turbo. Other anthropic options: claude-sonnet-4-6.

suggestedQuestions: What kind of clients do you work with?

deployment._note: Set automatically by scripts/setup.sh and scripts/build-and-deploy.sh. Local only.
